name: OpenClaw X Plugin
description: Tool-oriented OpenClaw plugin for X/Twitter account management with OAuth, authenticated reads (including followers), approval-gated publish, and local session/draft persistence.
notes: Requires user-supplied X app credentials: clientId, clientSecret, and redirectUri for OAuth-based account connection.
Stores session state and draft records in local JSON files; configure stable paths outside the plugin install directory.
Manifest reflects the current router/tool surface but still needs one clean end-to-end validation pass from a packaged reinstall path.
Follower-list reads require follows.read in the connected OAuth scope set; older sessions created before that scope was added must reconnect.
Draft creation and approval are dry-run-safe; x.post.publish performs a real X write when invoked with a valid approved draft and user token.

setup.summary: Requires user-supplied X OAuth app credentials and stores OAuth session/drafts in configured local JSON files.

securityNotes: Draft and session persistence is local-only and path-configurable.
Media upload reads only the explicit user-supplied media path and sends it to X upload endpoints after tool invocation.
Publish actions require a stored approved draft and valid user OAuth token.
